name: @emin-bit/power-platform-mcp
description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that bridges Claude with the Microsoft Power Platform CLI (pac and pacx), Dataverse Web API, and the Power Platform admin API. 118 typed tools covering auth, environments, solutions, canvas apps (local YAML↔JSON pack-sync fixing pac canvas pack's PA3013 bug + Dataverse layer inspect/remove), full 8/8 Power Pages CLI coverage plus pages_restart (the programmatic server-side cache-clear that replaces the Design Studio Sync browser dance), PCF, plugins, connections, connectors, applications, model builder, telemetry, PACX table/column/workflow operations, a generic passthrough escape hatch, a cross-platform pp_token helper, and pp_self_review log mining. Hardened solution_import refuses the wrong tenant. SERVER_INSTRUCTIONS embeds canvas + Power Pages deploy recipes, Power Fx cheatsheet, flow categories, and tenant-safety golden rules.
author: Emin Mujabašić

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run test
